description: Golden cases that prove PCX validators reject hallucinated Enma/AngelScript APIs and accept documented patterns.

cases.name: enma-rejects-invented-draw-esp
enma-requires-math-import
angelscript-rejects-enma-lifecycle
enma-rejects-pointer-arithmetic
cases.input: int64 main(){int32 x = 1; int32* p = &x; p = p + 1; return 1;}

cases.name: enma-rejects-new-stack-mismatch
cases.input:
class Foo {}
int64 main(){Foo x = new Foo(); return 1;}
